settings.title: Laser-Precise Rangefinding
settings.description: Blue Tees' advanced laser technology locks onto the pin from 1,000+ yards with slope-adjusted distances in under a second.

settings.title: Magnetic Cart Mount
settings.description: The redesigned magnetic mount system attaches instantly to any cart rail, keeping your rangefinder accessible for every shot.

settings.title: Tournament-Legal Modes
settings.description: Flag-Lock vibration and a one-button slope toggle make Blue Tees Series 3 Pro legal for tournament play without sacrificing features.

settings.title: Blue Tees Series 3 Pro
settings.hero_eyebrow: Blue Tees Golf · Available at Northcrest
settings.hero_sub2: Available at Northcrest Golf · Atlanta, GA
settings.intro_heading: Premium Rangefinding Without the Premium Price
settings.intro_body: Blue Tees Golf has redefined what golfers should expect from a rangefinder. The Series 3 Pro delivers tour-quality accuracy, slope compensation, and magnetic mounting in a package priced for every golfer. Pick one up at Northcrest and experience the confidence of knowing your exact yardage on every shot.
settings.excl_text: Northcrest carries the latest Blue Tees Golf lineup, including the Series 3 Pro. Try it before you buy it — our pro shop team is happy to demonstrate the full feature set and help you find the right model for your game.
settings.cta_heading: Pick Up Blue Tees at Northcrest
settings.cta_sub: Stop by the pro shop to see the full Blue Tees lineup or contact us to check availability on a specific model.
settings.collection_sub: Select a rangefinder below to learn more
